prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东南大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约4623名、4787名、5549名、5694名、5401名。整体呈波动后移趋势，2023年较2022年后移约762名，2024年继续后移至5694名，2025年小幅回升至5401名，近3年均值约5548名，2025年基准位次约5401名；东南大学在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年146人、2022年148人、2023年147人、2024年143人、2025年140人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划招生146人，较2025年增加6人，扩招约4.29%，扩招对录取位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东南大学是教育部直属的985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第17名、2022年第16名、2023年第15名、2024年第13名、2025年第16名、2026年第15名，稳居全国前20，属于顶尖高校层次；东南大学近年声誉整体平稳：2021年因校园安全事件（保安处理流浪狗）评价偏负面，2023年因师德师风事件（马院负责人发不雅图片被免职）评价偏负面，但均为多年前偶发事件，影响已基本消退；2024–2026年声誉文件中无新增负面记录。抖音热度排名第31位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映一定报考关注度。历史投档异常记录中无东南大学，录取稳定性良好；第五轮学科评估中，东南大学拥有18个A-及以上学科，其中A+学科5个（交通运输工程、土木工程、建筑学、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术），A学科4个（仪器科学与技术、信息与通信工程、城乡规划学、风景园林学），A-学科9个（动力工程及工程热物理、控制科学与工程、数学、机械工程、法学、电气工程、管理科学与工程、网络空间安全、计算机科学与技术）。优势学科覆盖该校在山东招生的电子信息类、计算机类、电气工程、工科试验班等核心专业，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化均为高热推荐/推荐专业，与东南大学优势学科高度匹配；土木建筑类专业热度分化观望，但东南大学土木工程为A+学科，品牌效应可部分对冲行业降温影响。山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约5.7%，考生规模持续扩大，竞争加剧。；东南大学位于江苏省南京市，与山东省地理相近，属华东地区，对山东考生有较强的地域吸引力。该校在山东省的招生人数占全国总招生比例较高（2025年约18.2%），是该校在省外的重要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：历年位次近3年均值约5548名，2025年基准5401名；2026年计划扩招6人（+4.29%）对位次有后移压力；山东省考生总数增加约5.7%进一步加剧竞争；学校层次顶尖、声誉稳定、优势学科突出，对考生有持续吸引力。在，预测2026年东南大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次约5540名，波动区间5040–6040名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（吴健雄班/吴健雄登峰班）
- 未来机器人（未来技术班）
- 电子信息类（信息工程、电子科学与技术、海洋信息工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、人工智能、软件工程、网络空间安全）
- 集成电路设计与集成系统
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能系统）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学等）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化培养）
- 文科试验班类（数智经济与智能管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5040–6040名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次优于区间下限（5040名以内），可重点冲刺一档的吴健雄班和电子信息类；若位次接近区间上限（6000名左右），建议以二档的计算机类、集成电路、电气工程为核心，三档的文科试验班类作为稳妥选择。东南大学工科实力突出，电子信息、计算机、电气等方向就业前景良好，值得重点考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Southeast University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 4623, 4787, 5549, 5694, and 5401 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating backward trend, with a shift of about 762 places backward in 2023 compared to 2022, continuing to 5694 in 2024, and a slight recovery to 5401 in 2025. The average over the past three years is about 5548, with the 2025 baseline ranking at approximately 5401. The enrollment plan for Southeast University in Shandong Province comprehensive category: 146 in 2021, 148 in 2022, 147 in 2023, 143 in 2024, and 140 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction year by year. The 2026 planned enrollment is 146, an increase of 6 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 4.29%, which exerts downward pressure on admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university directly under the Ministry of Education. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 17th in 2021, 16th in 2022, 15th in 2023, 13th in 2024, 16th in 2025, and 15th in 2026, consistently in the top 20 nationally, belonging to the top-tier university level. The reputation of Southeast University has been generally stable in recent years: in 2021, there were negative evaluations due to a campus safety incident (security handling of stray dogs), and in 2023, negative evaluations due to a teacher ethics incident (a person in charge of the Marxist Academy was dismissed for posting inappropriate images), but these were isolated incidents from years ago, and their impact has largely dissipated. No new negative records were found in the reputation documents from 2024 to 2026. It ranks 31st in TikTok popularity (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting a certain degree of application attention. There are no abnormal historical admission records for Southeast University, indicating good admission stability. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Southeast University has 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including 5 A+ disciplines (Transportation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), 4 A disciplines (Instrument Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture), and 9 A- disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering, Law, Electrical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Cyberspace Security, Computer Science and Technology). The advantageous disciplines cover core majors such as Electronic Information, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Engineering Experimental Classes that Southeast University recruits in Shandong, which have strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Analysis of major popularity in 2026 shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended/recommended majors, highly matching Southeast University's advantageous disciplines. Civil and Architectural majors have differentiated and wait-and-see popularity, but Southeast University's Civil Engineering is an A+ discipline, and its brand effect can partially offset the impact of industry cooling. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is about 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% compared to 681,000 in 2025, with the candidate scale continuing to expand and competition intensifying. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, geographically close to Shandong Province, belonging to the East China region, and has strong regional appeal to Shandong candidates. The number of students recruited by the university in Shandong Province accounts for a relatively high proportion of the total national enrollment (about 18.2% in 2025), making it one of the important source provinces outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: the average ranking over the past three years is about 5548, with a 2025 baseline of 5401; the 2026 planned expansion of 6 students (+4.29%) exerts downward pressure on rankings; the increase in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province by about 5.7% further intensifies competition; the university's top-tier level, stable reputation, and outstanding advantageous disciplines provide continuous appeal to candidates. Therefore, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Southeast University in Shandong Province comprehensive category in 2026 will be about 5540, with a fluctuation range of 5040–6040.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wu Jianxiong Class/Wu Jianxiong Summit Class)
- Future Robotics (Future Technology Class)
- Electronic Information (Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Marine Information Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Systems).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, etc.)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Training)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Digital Economy and Intelligent Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5040–6040, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 5040), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Wu Jianxiong Class and Electronic Information. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 6000), it is recommended to take Tier 2 majors such as Computer Science, Integrated Circuits, and Electrical Engineering as the core, and Tier 3 majors such as Liberal Arts Experimental Class as a stable choice. Southeast University has outstanding engineering strength, and majors such as Electronic Information, Computer Science, and Electrical Engineering have good employment prospects, making them worth considering.
